narrative:
North Canton 1-C (precinct in Stark County) has 926 registered voters, with 52.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.2%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.6 percentage points.
